center.name: Yanchep National Park
center.summary: Yanchep National Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括短嘴黑凤头鹦鹉，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Carnaby's black cockatoo (Zanda latirostris), also known as the short-billed black cockatoo, is a large black cockatoo endemic to southwest Australia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Carnaby's black cockatoo (Zanda latirostris), also known as the short-billed black cockatoo, is a large black cockatoo endemic to southwest Australia
